entries.notes: Distant silhouette (docs/art/crash-site-object-asset-inventory.md, 'Distant silhouettes'); background-only, huge/unreachable, never redirects the objective route. Integrated into scenes/Main/Main.tscn's DistantRock_6. Reworked 2026-07-16 after docs/art/reviews/distant-silhouettes-kit-v1-review.md's NOT_GO (original cone-stack geometry was indistinguishable from BasaltRidge's construction technique): now six translucent low-subdivision icosphere puffs widening upward, distinct silhouette and material technique from the rock kit. See docs/art/reviews/distant-silhouettes-kit-v1-review.md for the re-review.

entries.notes: Stage B candidate #10 (docs/art/STAGE_B_ORCHESTRATION_BRIEF.md; docs/art/ASSET_MANIFEST_V1.md 'Polish Details'); six wear-technique reference panels authored via geometry/color, not texture maps. Visual-only, collisionless. Integrated into production scenes (3 PolishDetailsModel instances in scenes/Main/Main.tscn). Correction 2026-07-16: PNG evidence does exist and is committed (added in commit 2cbe841, 2026-07-07, incidentally alongside an unrelated Alien Shard change) at the three review_artifacts paths below; an earlier note here claiming 'no PNG evidence... missing xvfb-run' was written from a stale docs/production/quality-scorecard-log.md narrative without checking the working tree, and was wrong. What is still genuinely missing is a docs/art/reviews/ verdict.
